'''鈭歬-j-t-r''' ('''kakajteroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulcanize|vulcanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulcanize|vulcanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-j-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kakajteroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajteroko|thikajteroko]] || [[word:jikajteroko|jikajteroko]] || [[word:shikajteroko|shikajteroko]] || [[word:kikajteroko|kikajteroko]]
